jsxFactoryIndirectCallInNonModule.tsx(4,16): error TS7026: JSX element implicitly has type 'any' because no interface 'JSX.IntrinsicElements' exists.
jsxFactoryIndirectCallInNonModule.tsx(4,42): error TS7026: JSX element implicitly has type 'any' because no interface 'JSX.IntrinsicElements' exists.


==== jsxFactoryIndirectCallInNonModule.tsx (2 errors) ====
    // file is intentionally not a module - tests that jsx factory calls use indirect call pattern
    class Component {
        render() {
            return <div>{null/* preserved */}</div>;
                   ~~~~~
!!! error TS7026: JSX element implicitly has type 'any' because no interface 'JSX.IntrinsicElements' exists.
                                             ~~~~~~
!!! error TS7026: JSX element implicitly has type 'any' because no interface 'JSX.IntrinsicElements' exists.
        }
    }
